🔒 7 / 25
Twenty-five golden eggs — a whole dynasty measured out in farms raised, sold, and quietly remembered.

status.title: ⚒️ Forge — the morning heat check
status.description:
A blacksmith's forge banked hot before dawn, where raw ore, a roaring fire, and a patient hammer are turned bar by bar into bright iron ingots.

While you were away from the forge, the coals never went cold and the hammer never stopped: +1,054,800 🔩 iron ingots

shop.title: 🔥 The Foundry Workshop
shop.description: Spend iron ingots on hotter bellows, harder dies, and a faster, fiercer forge.

fields.name: 🔥 double-lunged bellows
fields.value:
✅ Heat level 0 → 1 · 60 🔩 iron ingots · affordable now
A twin-chamber bellows that never lets the fire dim; the coals run white-hot, so every bar softens sooner and the apprentice's hammer bites deeper.

fields.name: 🛠️ hardened anvil dies
fields.value:
⚠️ Heat level 1 → 2 · 345 🔩 iron ingots · requires ⚙️ trip-hammer
Case-hardened swage dies bolted under the trip-hammer; each blow lands truer and the billets come off the anvil finished in half the strokes.

prestige.title: 🔥 quench and reforge
prestige.description: When the forge is buried in ingots, plunge the whole glowing batch into the slack tub, fold and reforge the best of it into a single billet of damascus steel, and rake the fire back to life for a fresh start.

fields.name: 🔩 iron ingots
fields.value: ✅ lifetime iron toward the reforge: 150,000 / 100,000

achievements.title: ⚒️ Forge
achievements.description: A blacksmith's forge banked hot before dawn, where raw ore, a roaring fire, and a patient hammer are turned bar by bar into bright iron ingots.

fields.name: 🔨 full forge floor
fields.value:
✅ 10 / 10
Ten hammers ringing at once — the whole shop shakes with the beat of iron on iron.

fields.name: ⚙️ hundred-hammer foundry
fields.value:
⏳ 100 / 100
A hundred trip-hammers driven off one race; the roar of the foundry carries clear across the valley.

fields.name: 🏆 forge empire
fields.value:
🔒 150 / 1,000
A thousand fires burning night and day — smiths three kingdoms over apprentice under your foremen.

fields.name: 🧱 first thousand bars
fields.value:
✅ 1,000 / 1,000
The first thousand ingots drawn, stamped, and stacked cooling on the racks.

fields.name: 🎖️ armory of iron
fields.value:
⏳ 100,000 / 100,000
A hundred thousand ingots; your mark is struck into blades and plough-blades in every market square.

fields.name: 👑 iron of legend
fields.value:
🔒 150,000 / 10,000,000
Ten million ingots. Smiths tell tales of your forge the way sailors tell tales of the sea.

fields.name: 🗡️ first reforge
fields.value:
✅ 1 / 1
The first batch quenched and folded — one billet of damascus steel set aside as the fire is raked back to life.

fields.name: ⚔️ rack of damascus
fields.value:
⏳ 5 / 5
Five folded billets of damascus steel racked in the cellar — five forges cooled and begun anew.

fields.name: 🌟 master of the fold
fields.value:
🔒 7 / 25
Twenty-five billets of damascus steel — every master blade on the continent traces its pattern back to one of your reforges.

status.title: 🏚️ Haunted Manor — the night ledger
status.description:
A creaking old manor whose restless spirits pay their rent in ectoplasm.

While you were away, the spirits kept seeping: +1,054,800 🌫️ ectoplasm

shop.title: 🕯️ The Séance Supply Cabinet
shop.description: Spend ectoplasm to make the haunting that little bit worse.

fields.name: 🕯️ midnight candles
fields.value:
✅ Haunting level 0 → 1 · 60 🌫️ ectoplasm · affordable now
Candles lit at exactly midnight; the portrait broods harder and weeps faster.

fields.name: 🪵 creakier floorboards
fields.value:
⚠️ Haunting level 1 → 2 · 345 🌫️ ectoplasm · requires 🪑 poltergeist parlor
Loosened floorboards give the poltergeists more to slam; the parlor's output rattles upward.

prestige.title: 📿 hold a séance
prestige.description: Gather the household for one last séance and set every spirit free — they remember you kindly.

fields.name: 🌫️ ectoplasm
fields.value: ✅ lifetime ectoplasm toward the séance: 150,000 / 100,000

achievements.title: 🏚️ Haunted Manor
achievements.description: A creaking old manor whose restless spirits pay their rent in ectoplasm.

fields.name: 🖼️ first haunting
fields.value:
✅ 10 / 10
Ten spectres stirring at once — the manor finally earns the word haunted.

fields.name: 🕸️ restless household
fields.value:
⏳ 100 / 100
A hundred spectres at work; no guest ever makes it past the foyer.

fields.name: 🏰 manor of a thousand ghosts
fields.value:
🔒 150 / 1,000
A thousand spectres — the house holds more dead than the town holds living.

fields.name: 🌫️ first thousand drops
fields.value:
✅ 1,000 / 1,000
A thousand drops of ectoplasm skimmed from the cold spots and bottled.

fields.name: 🎖️ spectral fortune
fields.value:
⏳ 100,000 / 100,000
A hundred thousand drops; the cellar glows faintly up through the floorboards.

fields.name: 👑 legend of the manor
fields.value:
🔒 150,000 / 10,000,000
Ten million drops of ectoplasm. Ghost-hunters retire rather than knock.

fields.name: 👻 first freed spirit
fields.value:
✅ 1 / 1
One restless spirit set free — and grateful enough now to owe you a favor.

fields.name: 💀 grateful dead
fields.value:
⏳ 5 / 5
Five freed spirits, each drifting back on cold nights to lend a colder hand.

fields.name: 📿 master of séances
fields.value:
🔒 7 / 25
Twenty-five freed spirits — the veil parts for you like a held-open door.

status.title: 🎤 Idol Agency — the fandom report
status.description:
A scrappy talent agency turning midnight practice and shaky livestreams into stadium-filling stardom.

While you were offstage, the fandom kept the lightsticks waving: +1,054,800 💖 fans

shop.title: 💿 The Producer's Desk
shop.description: Spend fan devotion on polish, practice, and a little stage magic.

fields.name: 🩷 guest choreography coach
fields.value:
✅ Spotlight level 0 → 1 · 60 💖 fans · affordable now
A legendary coach tightens every eight-count; the practice room turns polish into devotion.

fields.name: 🎬 viral fancam edit
fields.value:
⚠️ Spotlight level 1 → 2 · 345 💖 fans · requires 📡 livestream studio
One perfectly timed fancam edit and the algorithm falls in love; the studio's numbers go vertical.

prestige.title: 🎓 graduate and debut a new group
prestige.description: Hold the tearful graduation concert, hang the platinum record, and audition a brand-new lineup — the agency's next era starts tonight.

fields.name: 💖 fans
fields.value: ✅ lifetime fans toward the graduation stage: 150,000 / 100,000

achievements.title: 🎤 Idol Agency
achievements.description: A scrappy talent agency turning midnight practice and shaky livestreams into stadium-filling stardom.

fields.name: 🩰 first fandom
fields.value:
✅ 10 / 10
Ten acts drilling at once — the agency finally sounds like a hit factory.

fields.name: 🎶 chart-topping roster
fields.value:
⏳ 100 / 100
A hundred acts in rotation; the trending page is basically your roster.

fields.name: 🏙️ entertainment empire
fields.value:
🔒 150 / 1,000
A thousand acts — every stadium in the country books through your desk.

fields.name: 💖 first thousand fans
fields.value:
✅ 1,000 / 1,000
The first thousand fans, won one encore and one shaky livestream at a time.

fields.name: 🎟️ sold-out arenas
fields.value:
⏳ 100,000 / 100,000
A hundred thousand fans; the lightstick ocean stretches past the nosebleeds.

fields.name: 👑 household name
fields.value:
🔒 150,000 / 10,000,000
Ten million fans. Your groups trend before they have even announced.

fields.name: 💿 first platinum record
fields.value:
✅ 1 / 1
The first platinum record on the wall — a fandom built up from absolute zero.

fields.name: 🏆 platinum wall
fields.value:
⏳ 5 / 5
Five platinum records framed in a row; new trainees photograph them for luck.

fields.name: 🌟 hall of fame
fields.value:
🔒 7 / 25
Twenty-five platinum records — the industry names its trophies after your eras.

status.title: 🗼 Lighthouse Keep — the night watch log
status.description:
A salt-bitten tower on the last headland, where one stubborn flame argues with the fog and wins.

While you slept in the watch room, the beam kept sweeping the channel: +1,054,800 🔆 lamplight

shop.title: 🧰 The Keeper's Store Room
shop.description: Spend lamplight on brighter wicks, truer glass, and a tower the fog cannot argue with.

fields.name: 🪞 polished reflectors
fields.value:
✅ Watch level 0 → 1 · 60 🔆 lamplight · affordable now
Silvered reflectors set behind the wick; the lantern spends the same oil and throws twice the shine.

fields.name: ⚖️ counterweight drive
fields.value:
⚠️ Watch level 1 → 2 · 345 🔆 lamplight · requires 🔦 fresnel array
A rewound counterweight drive spins the array smooth and constant; the beam never stutters again.

prestige.title: 🌅 hand over the keep
prestige.description: Log the last watch, hand the keys to a new keeper, and carry one retired lens up the coast to raise a taller tower.

fields.name: 🔆 lamplight
fields.value: ✅ lifetime lamplight toward handing over the keep: 150,000 / 100,000

achievements.title: 🗼 Lighthouse Keep
achievements.description: A salt-bitten tower on the last headland, where one stubborn flame argues with the fog and wins.

fields.name: 🕯️ first watch lit
fields.value:
✅ 10 / 10
Ten lamps burning at once — from the sea, the headland finally looks inhabited.

fields.name: ✨ coastline constellation
fields.value:
⏳ 100 / 100
A hundred lamps; sailors steer by your headland before they trust their own charts.

fields.name: 🗺️ keeper of the coast
fields.value:
🔒 150 / 1,000
A thousand lamps — the whole seaboard blinks to your rhythm after dusk.

fields.name: 📔 first thousand measures
fields.value:
✅ 1,000 / 1,000
The first thousand measures of lamplight, logged in a salt-stained ledger.

fields.name: ⛈️ storm-proven
fields.value:
⏳ 100,000 / 100,000
A hundred thousand measures of lamplight; captains toast a tower they have never once visited.

fields.name: 👑 the light that never failed
fields.value:
🔒 150,000 / 10,000,000
Ten million measures of lamplight. Not one wreck on your watch — the charts mark this coast as kind.

fields.name: 💠 first retired lens
fields.value:
✅ 1 / 1
The first keep handed over — one fresnel lens, heavier than its story.

fields.name: 🏛️ gallery of lenses
fields.value:
⏳ 5 / 5
Five retired lenses catching the sun in the tower's base; visitors whisper without knowing why.

fields.name: 🌅 dynasty of keepers
fields.value:
🔒 7 / 25
Twenty-five retired lenses — every light on the coast traces its flame back to yours.

status.title: 🏴‍☠️ Pirate Cove — the captain's ledger
status.description:
A hidden smugglers' cove where every tide brings in doubloons and nobody asks where they came from.

While ye were ashore, the tide kept the smugglers busy: +1,054,800 🪙 doubloons

shop.title: ⚓ The Quartermaster's Stores
shop.description: Spend doubloons to keep the skiffs swift and the crew wicked.

fields.name: ⛵ patched black sails
fields.value:
✅ Infamy level 0 → 1 · 60 🪙 doubloons · affordable now
New sailcloth dyed midnight black; the skiff runs faster and the customs sloop sees nothing.

fields.name: 🥃 double rum rations
fields.value:
⚠️ Infamy level 1 → 2 · 345 🪙 doubloons · requires 🍻 tavern crew
Twice the rum makes the crew twice as charming; the dice keep landing the cove's way.

prestige.title: 🗺️ bury the treasure and set sail
prestige.description: Sink the chest beneath the palm, burn the map into memory, and chase a fresh horizon — the sea remembers your legend.

fields.name: 🪙 doubloons
fields.value: ✅ lifetime doubloons toward the buried chest: 150,000 / 100,000

achievements.title: 🏴‍☠️ Pirate Cove
achievements.description: A hidden smugglers' cove where every tide brings in doubloons and nobody asks where they came from.

fields.name: 🛶 first fleet
fields.value:
✅ 10 / 10
Ten crews working the tide at once — the cove finally sounds like a pirate haven.

fields.name: ⛵ smuggler's flotilla
fields.value:
⏳ 100 / 100
A hundred crews on the water; the customs sloop stops leaving harbor at all.

fields.name: 🏴‍☠️ scourge of the coast
fields.value:
🔒 150 / 1,000
A thousand crews — every port on the map flies your flag or fears it.

fields.name: 🪙 first thousand doubloons
fields.value:
✅ 1,000 / 1,000
A thousand doubloons counted twice, trusted never, and buried once for luck.

fields.name: 💰 captain's fortune
fields.value:
⏳ 100,000 / 100,000
A hundred thousand doubloons; the hold rides low and the crew grins wide.

fields.name: 👑 legend of the seas
fields.value:
🔒 150,000 / 10,000,000
Ten million doubloons. Navies name their worst storms after your worst nights.

fields.name: ⚱️ first cursed relic
fields.value:
✅ 1 / 1
One cursed relic in the chest — off a ship that should have stayed sunk.

fields.name: 💀 cursed reliquary
fields.value:
⏳ 5 / 5
Five cursed relics, humming in the dark, best not counted after midnight.

fields.name: 🗺️ ghost of the horizon
fields.value:
🔒 7 / 25
Twenty-five relics — the sea itself carries rumors of where you'll strike next.

status.title: ⚗️ Potion Brewery — the stockroom ledger
status.description:
A crooked little brewery where the pots mutter to themselves and every bottle glows.

While you were out, the cauldrons muttered to themselves and kept right on bubbling: +1,054,800 🧪 potions

shop.title: 📜 The Alchemist's Catalogue
shop.description: Trade bottled potions for hotter flames, wiser apprentices, and a brewery that mutters back when you lock up for the night.

fields.name: 🔥 hotter flames
fields.value:
✅ Brew grade 0 → 1 · 60 🧪 potions · affordable now
Stoke the fire under the cauldron; a fiercer boil means faster brewing.

fields.name: 📖 dog-eared grimoire
fields.value:
⚠️ Brew grade 1 → 2 · 345 🧪 potions · requires 🧙 apprentice alchemist
A hand-annotated grimoire; every apprentice who studies it brews with fewer mistakes.

prestige.title: ✨ transcend the craft
prestige.description: Shutter the brewery, distill everything you have learned, and begin again with arcane essence in hand.

fields.name: 🧪 potions
fields.value: ✅ lifetime potions toward transcendence: 150,000 / 100,000

achievements.title: ⚗️ Potion Brewery
achievements.description: A crooked little brewery where the pots mutter to themselves and every bottle glows.

fields.name: 🫕 a proper kitchen
fields.value:
✅ 10 / 10
Ten brewers bubbling at once — the hallway smells permanently of lavender and sulfur.

fields.name: 🏰 guild-sized operation
fields.value:
⏳ 100 / 100
A hundred brewers going at once; the guild stops sending inspectors and starts sending spectators.

fields.name: 🌋 the thousand-pot works
fields.value:
🔒 150 / 1,000
A thousand brewers roiling — the town downwind reports shared dreams and unusually purple sunsets.

fields.name: 📦 first crate corked
fields.value:
✅ 1,000 / 1,000
A thousand potions sealed and shelved without a single explosion. Well, one.

fields.name: 👑 royal supplier
fields.value:
⏳ 100,000 / 100,000
A hundred thousand potions — the palace buys by the wagonload and pays, for once, on time.

fields.name: 🌠 legend of the still
fields.value:
🔒 150,000 / 10,000,000
Ten million potions; apprentices whisper your recipes like scripture.

fields.name: 💧 first drop of essence
fields.value:
✅ 1 / 1
One measure of arcane essence — the craft finally distilled to its truth.

fields.name: 🧿 essence in reserve
fields.value:
⏳ 5 / 5
Five measures of essence humming softly in their vials, warm to the touch and faintly impatient.

fields.name: 🌌 transcendent brewer
fields.value:
🔒 7 / 25
Twenty-five measures — you no longer follow recipes; recipes follow you.

status.title: 🍜 Ramen Stand — the night market tally
status.description:
A one-lantern noodle cart in the night market, where the broth has simmered longer than the city has had streetlights.

While you napped behind the curtain, the stockpot never stopped rolling: +1,054,800 🍜 bowls

shop.title: 🏮 The Cart's Back Shelf
shop.description: Spend bowls on deeper broth, springier noodles, and a lantern bright enough to summon the whole street.

fields.name: 🧂 overnight tare
fields.value:
✅ Ladle level 0 → 1 · 60 🍜 bowls · affordable now
A deeper, darker tare steeped overnight; one ladleful in the bowl and the regulars close their eyes.

fields.name: 🔩 sharper brass dies
fields.value:
⚠️ Ladle level 1 → 2 · 345 🍜 bowls · requires 🥢 noodle press
Fresh-cut brass dies fitted to the press; the noodles come out springier and the queue moves twice as fast.

prestige.title: 🏮 roll the cart on
prestige.description: Hang the last golden ladle, wipe down the counter, and wheel the cart to a new corner where nobody knows the broth yet.

fields.name: 🍜 bowls
fields.value: ✅ lifetime bowls toward rolling the cart on: 150,000 / 100,000

achievements.title: 🍜 Ramen Stand
achievements.description: A one-lantern noodle cart in the night market, where the broth has simmered longer than the city has had streetlights.

fields.name: 🥢 first full counter
fields.value:
✅ 10 / 10
Ten burners going at once — the steam column marks the stand from three alleys away.

fields.name: 🔥 hundred-burner kitchen
fields.value:
⏳ 100 / 100
A hundred burners; the night market quietly rearranges itself around your queue.

fields.name: 🏮 noodle empire
fields.value:
🔒 150 / 1,000
A thousand burners — every alley in the city smells faintly of your broth.

fields.name: 🍜 first thousand bowls
fields.value:
✅ 1,000 / 1,000
The first thousand bowls, slurped clean and stacked into a wobbling porcelain tower.

fields.name: 🚶 queue around the block
fields.value:
⏳ 100,000 / 100,000
A hundred thousand bowls; strangers queue on rumor alone and leave as regulars.

fields.name: 👑 broth of legend
fields.value:
🔒 150,000 / 10,000,000
Ten million bowls. Cooks across the city bow to a cart they have only heard described.

fields.name: 🥄 first golden ladle
fields.value:
✅ 1 / 1
The first corner conquered — one golden ladle, still warm from the stockpot.

fields.name: 🏆 rack of ladles
fields.value:
⏳ 5 / 5
Five golden ladles clinking overhead; the cart sounds like a wind chime when it rolls.

fields.name: 🌙 the wandering legend
fields.value:
🔒 7 / 25
Twenty-five golden ladles — the cart is a myth that keeps arriving exactly where the city is hungriest.

status.title: 🥐 Royal Bakery — the morning proof
status.description:
A flour-dusted bakehouse by appointment to the crown, where the ovens never cool and the queue never ends.

While you were away from the counter, the ovens never cooled: +1,054,800 🥐 pastries

shop.title: 🧾 The Pantry Ledger
shop.description: Trade pastries for a warmer, busier bakehouse.

fields.name: 🌾 stone-ground flour
fields.value:
✅ Recipe mastery 0 → 1 · 60 🥐 pastries · affordable now
Finer flour from the old mill; the starter rises faster and the crumb turns cloud-light.

fields.name: 🚪 twin hearth doors
fields.value:
⚠️ Recipe mastery 1 → 2 · 345 🥐 pastries · requires 🧱 brick oven
A second door on the hearth; loaves go in as loaves come out, and the oven never waits.

prestige.title: 🏰 open a new royal franchise
prestige.description: Hand the keys to your best baker, take the crown's charter, and raise a new bakehouse in a new town — with royal seals to your name.

fields.name: 🥐 pastries
fields.value: ✅ lifetime pastries toward the charter: 150,000 / 100,000

achievements.title: 🥐 Royal Bakery
achievements.description: A flour-dusted bakehouse by appointment to the crown, where the ovens never cool and the queue never ends.

fields.name: 🔥 first hearth lit
fields.value:
✅ 10 / 10
Ten ovens firing at once — the bakehouse finally fills with the good noise.

fields.name: 🥐 guild bakehouse
fields.value:
⏳ 100 / 100
A hundred ovens going; the morning queue winds clear around the square.

fields.name: 🏰 royal bakery empire
fields.value:
🔒 150 / 1,000
A thousand ovens — every town of note eats your crust by royal charter.

fields.name: 🥐 first thousand pastries
fields.value:
✅ 1,000 / 1,000
The first thousand pastries out of the oven, counted warm onto the cooling racks.

fields.name: 🎖️ by appointment to the crown
fields.value:
⏳ 100,000 / 100,000
A hundred thousand pastries; the palace now orders by the cartload.

fields.name: 👑 legend of the ovens
fields.value:
🔒 150,000 / 10,000,000
Ten million pastries. Rival bakers make pilgrimages just to smell the air.

fields.name: 👑 first royal seal
fields.value:
✅ 1 / 1
The first wax seal of royal favor — one bakehouse chartered and thriving.

fields.name: 📜 sealed charters
fields.value:
⏳ 5 / 5
Five royal seals in the strongbox, one per bakehouse founded and fed.

fields.name: 🏰 baker to the realm
fields.value:
🔒 7 / 25
Twenty-five royal seals — the crown sets its table by your calendar.

status.title: 🪐 Space Colony — life-support readout
status.description:
A fledgling outpost on a far-off world, kept alive one breath at a time.

While you slept in cryo, the scrubbers held the line and the colony kept breathing without you: +1,054,800 🫧 oxygen

shop.title: 🛠️ Colony Requisitions
shop.description: Spend hard-won oxygen on brighter arrays, denser gardens, and hardware that buys the outpost one more sunrise.

fields.name: 🪞 polished reflectors
fields.value:
✅ Mark 0 → 1 · 60 🫧 oxygen · affordable now
Mirror-finish reflectors squeeze more light into every panel of the solar array.

fields.name: 🧪 enriched nutrient feed
fields.value:
⚠️ Mark 1 → 2 · 345 🫧 oxygen · requires 🌱 hydroponics bay
A richer feed line for the hydroponics bay; every rack grows denser and breathes harder.

prestige.title: 🚀 launch a new colony
prestige.description: Pack the ship, leave the outpost behind, and found a new colony with alien artifacts in the hold.

fields.name: 🫧 oxygen
fields.value: ✅ lifetime oxygen banked toward the next launch: 150,000 / 100,000

achievements.title: 🪐 Space Colony
achievements.description: A fledgling outpost on a far-off world, kept alive one breath at a time.

fields.name: 🏗️ first hab module
fields.value:
✅ 10 / 10
Ten machines humming in the dark — the outpost has its first crooked little skyline.

fields.name: 🗺️ sector on the map
fields.value:
⏳ 100 / 100
A hundred installations wired together; the orbital star charts finally print your outpost by name.

fields.name: 🌍 terraforming tier
fields.value:
🔒 150 / 1,000
A thousand installations running hot — the dead planet is, ever so faintly, starting to breathe back.

fields.name: 🫙 first tank banked
fields.value:
✅ 1,000 / 1,000
A thousand units of oxygen sealed in reserve — for the first time, nobody rations their breath tonight.

fields.name: 🏙️ breathable dome
fields.value:
⏳ 100,000 / 100,000
A hundred thousand units banked — the dome stops whistling at night and the masks come off indoors.

fields.name: 💫 atmosphere exporter
fields.value:
🔒 150,000 / 10,000,000
Ten million units of oxygen — the neighboring outposts have stopped begging and started buying from you.

fields.name: 🗿 first artifact
fields.value:
✅ 1 / 1
One alien artifact sealed in the hold — cold proof that someone walked this world long before you.

fields.name: 🏛️ xenoarchive shelf
fields.value:
⏳ 5 / 5
Five artifacts racked on the shelf, each one older than your entire civilization put together.

fields.name: 📜 precursor scholar
fields.value:
🔒 7 / 25
Twenty-five artifacts catalogued — you read the vanished precursors' script like a morning briefing.

status.title: 🍇 Vineyard — the morning cellar count
status.description:
A hillside wine estate ripening in the long afternoon light, where patient vine rows and a groaning estate press turn each harvest, cask by cask, into deep cellared wine.

While you were away from the estate, the vines kept ripening and the casks kept filling: +1,054,800 🍷 casks of wine

shop.title: 🍷 The Estate Cellar
shop.description: Spend casks of wine on better trellises, a stronger press, and a fuller, faster harvest.

fields.name: 🌿 espaliered trellises
fields.value:
✅ Vintage tier 0 → 1 · 60 🍷 casks of wine · affordable now
Vines trained flat along wire espaliers to catch every hour of sun; each row sets a heavier crop, so the hand-pickers fill their baskets that bit sooner.

fields.name: ⚙️ geared basket press
fields.value:
⚠️ Vintage tier 1 → 2 · 345 🍷 casks of wine · requires ⚙️ estate winepress
A ratcheted, geared basket fitted over the winepress; every turn of the screw bites deeper and the tubs run dry of must in half the time.

prestige.title: 🍾 lay down the cellar
prestige.description: When the cellar overflows with young wine, bottle the very finest of the year, seal it under the château as a grand cru vintage, and prune the slope back to bare wood for a fresh season.

fields.name: 🍷 casks of wine
fields.value: ✅ lifetime wine toward the vintage: 150,000 / 100,000

achievements.title: 🍇 Vineyard
achievements.description: A hillside wine estate ripening in the long afternoon light, where patient vine rows and a groaning estate press turn each harvest, cask by cask, into deep cellared wine.

fields.name: 🌱 first full row
fields.value:
✅ 10 / 10
Ten vines staked and tied along the terrace — the slope finally rustles like a working vineyard at last light.

fields.name: 🍇 hundred-vine estate
fields.value:
⏳ 100 / 100
A hundred vine rows climbing the hill; the harvest crew needs a second cart and the cellar a second aisle.

fields.name: 🏆 vineyard empire
fields.value:
🔒 150 / 1,000
A thousand rows across the valley — vintners three regions over graft their cuttings from your slopes.

fields.name: 🛢️ first thousand casks
fields.value:
✅ 1,000 / 1,000
The first thousand casks racked, bunged, and chalked with the year — the cellar smells of oak and new wine.

fields.name: 🎖️ cellar of renown
fields.value:
⏳ 100,000 / 100,000
A hundred thousand casks; your estate label is poured at every fair table from the coast to the capital.

fields.name: 👑 wine of legend
fields.value:
🔒 150,000 / 10,000,000
Ten million casks. Sommeliers speak your vintages the way poets speak of summers long past.

fields.name: 🍾 first grand cru
fields.value:
✅ 1 / 1
The first year laid down — one sealed grand cru vintage cellared under the château as the slope is pruned bare again.

fields.name: 🍷 rack of vintages
fields.value:
⏳ 5 / 5
Five grand cru vintages resting in the cellar rack — five harvests cellared and begun anew.

fields.name: 🌟 master vintner
fields.value:
🔒 7 / 25
Twenty-five grand cru vintages — every great cellar on the continent keeps a bottle of your reserve for the occasions that matter.

status.title: 🧙 Wizard Tower — the evening attunement
status.description:
A crooked tower above the clouds where mana condenses on the windowsills and every floor holds a stranger discipline.

While you wandered other planes, the tower kept humming with mana: +1,054,800 🔮 mana

shop.title: 🔮 The Arcanum Exchange
shop.description: Trade raw mana for a taller, stranger, more studious tower.

fields.name: 🪶 self-inking quills
fields.value:
✅ Circle 0 → 1 · 60 🔮 mana · affordable now
Quills that never run dry; the scribes stop dipping and never look up from the page.

fields.name: 🌀 levitating stacks
fields.value:
⚠️ Circle 1 → 2 · 345 🔮 mana · requires 📚 enchanted library
The shelves learn to drift to the reader; the library spends no time fetching and all of it humming.

prestige.title: 🌌 ascend to the astral plane
prestige.description: Unmoor the tower from the world and step through the topmost door — you return to an empty foundation with crystallized starlight in your sleeves.

fields.name: 🔮 mana
fields.value: ✅ lifetime mana toward the ascension: 150,000 / 100,000

achievements.title: 🧙 Wizard Tower
achievements.description: A crooked tower above the clouds where mana condenses on the windowsills and every floor holds a stranger discipline.

fields.name: 🖋️ first circle
fields.value:
✅ 10 / 10
Ten workings running at once — the tower finally hums the way a wizard's should.

fields.name: 📚 conclave of floors
fields.value:
⏳ 100 / 100
A hundred workings underway; each floor mutters a different discipline.

fields.name: 🏰 tower beyond counting
fields.value:
🔒 150 / 1,000
A thousand workings — the stairwell no longer agrees on how tall you are.

fields.name: 🔮 first thousand mana
fields.value:
✅ 1,000 / 1,000
The first thousand drops of mana, distilled from moonlit air and jarred.

fields.name: 💧 brimming reservoir
fields.value:
⏳ 100,000 / 100,000
A hundred thousand drops of mana; the cellar sigils glow through the stone.

fields.name: 👑 wellspring of legend
fields.value:
🔒 150,000 / 10,000,000
Ten million drops of mana. Rival towers send apprentices just to measure the air.

fields.name: ✨ first starlight
fields.value:
✅ 1 / 1
One shard of crystallized starlight — proof of a plane survived and left behind.

fields.name: 🌟 starlit reserve
fields.value:
⏳ 5 / 5
Five shards of crystallized starlight, cold and patient in their velvet case.

fields.name: 🌌 archmage ascendant
fields.value:
🔒 7 / 25
Twenty-five shards — you step between planes the way others step between rooms.
